name: github-expert-plugin
description: GitHub Expert Plugin — specialist in managing the Tech BM Second Brain GitHub repository (arthurpaivar/TBM). One skill: GitHub Repository Specialist (TBM repository structure, three element types — plugins/skills/commands, git clone with token access method for Cowork VM, Claude/Cowork → GitHub → Obsidian sync workflow, validation standards). Three commands: create-github-element (add new plugins, skills, or commands with validation gate), update-github-element (primary command — sync changes from Claude/Cowork to GitHub with comparison and README cascade), remove-github-element (double confirmation safety gate for permanent removal). All commands follow layered What/How/Why framework and reference the github-repository-specialist skill for access method and validation.
